programmes.show_description: This channel is currently off air.
Extreme angler Jeremy Wade goes on the hunt for killer catfish, as he follows stories of a man swallowed whole by a giant fish and another attacked in a most unnatural fashion. (HD)
While treating a sick baby, Dr Goodwin uncovers dark secrets its parents would prefer to keep hidden, while Rose and Ormerod have an adventure at a hippy encampment. (HD)
Ireland's most decorated cerebral palsy footballer, Gary Messett, sits down with Tommy Martin to talk about a glittering career that had to overcome so many personal challenges. (HD)
The first female jockey to ride a Cheltenham winner in 18 years, Nina Carberry reflects on a pioneering career, a life immersed in horseracing, and her influence on other women. (SL,HD)
Three fashionistas compete with each other in a shopping spree to win the ultimate prize of going on a blind date with a fashion savvy singleton. (HD)
Three fashionistas compete with each other in a shopping spree to win the ultimate prize of going on a blind date with a fashion savvy singleton. (HD)
Hosted by Emma Willis and comedian Tom Allen, we pair eight celebrities with professional chefs who mentor, teach and take them from passionate amateurs to restaurant-level cooks. (HD)
One of Leinster's brightest young prospects, Ian McKinley's life was rocked when he lost sight in his eye with a horrific rugby injury. (HD)
A lively mix of celebrity chat with national and international guests, fabulous food from the country's top Chefs, expert advice and all the unmissable stories making the headlines (HD)
Ainsley is joined by chefs Serena Appleby and Judy Joo at Tyntesfield, Somerset for a light-hearted cooking contest in the National Trust estate's, stunning kitchen garden. (HD)
One of Ireland's greatest ever footballers opens up in a powerful in-depth interview about his life and a career from St. Pat's to Man United, racism and Jack Charlton. (HD)
Jeremy Wade visits Thailand in search of one of the world's most terrifying river fish, the giant freshwater stingray. Armed with a venomous tail, it tests Jeremy to his limit. (HD)
Sydney Airport is one of the busiest transport hubs in the world. Offering unprecedented access behind the scenes and capturing all the drama as it unfolds. (HD)
Daria and Emma have seven days to drop some pounds for a party. Bridesmaids Emma and Elisa test drive a six week diet plan. And Dom and Adam prepare to slim over four months. (HD)

Bradley Walsh hosts a spin-off from The Chase in which contestants take on two, three, four or all five of the quiz's resident experts at once. (HD)
Huge global hit game show The Chase is the ultimate heart-racing, high-pressure quiz. (HD)
Presided over by outspoken Judge Judith Sheindlin; with her no-nonsense, decisive approach to justice; she has established herself as a pop-culture icon for generations of viewers. (HD)
A mix of celebrity interviews, entertainment news, current affairs discussions, a look at sports competitions, health columns, cooking tips and tricks, and more. (HD)

Comment and analysis on the big stories of the day in Ireland and abroad with a panel of guests covering the key issues. (HD)
The arrival of a new locum ruffles some feathers, while a day at the races seems perfect for Carnegie and Catherine's first date - if they can avoid the others. (HD)
Carruth talks about his life inside and outside of the boxing ring. Including that faithful night in 1992, becoming the first Irishman to win an Olympic Gold medal in boxing. (HD)
